start_new: ⚜ Welcome! Your profile has been created.
help_text: ❓ Need help? This bot allows you to add your channels to our automatic promotion platform. 🚀 Features: - Add your channels to make them discovered. - Track growth statistics. - Benefit from regular promotions (Megas). 🛠 Commands: - /start: Main menu. - /help: Show this message. Use the 📖 Guide button to learn how to register your channel!
guide_text: 📖 User Guide Follow these steps to register your channel on the platform: 1️⃣ Prerequisites: - Your channel must have at least {min} members (verified at addition). - The bot must be an Administrator of your channel with Invite Users permission. 2️⃣ Addition: - Click on ➕ Add a channel. - Forward a message from your channel or send its @username. 3️⃣ Category: - Choose the category that best matches your content. 4️⃣ Validation: - Once added, your channel will be included in the next automatic promotions! ⚠️ Warning: Failure to follow rules or attempted fraud will result in a permanent ban of your channel. 💡 Tip: The more active your channel, the more it will be featured in lists!
share_text: offers you the best cross-promotion services! Add your channel and participate in promotions. Join now {promo_name}
admin_settings_msg: ⚙ Configure the bot ⚙ You can modify global settings here like headers/footers, minimum required members, and auto-delete.
prompt_set_header: Please send the new header (use /empty to clear):
prompt_set_footer: Please send the new footer (use /empty to clear):
prompt_set_delete: How many minutes before auto-deletion? (Enter a number):
prompt_set_members: Enter minimum and maximum members separated by a space (ex: 1000 50000):
prompt_set_min_mem: Please send the minimum number of subscribers:
prompt_set_max_mem: Please send the maximum number of subscribers:
prompt_set_tz: Please send the timezone or share your location:
prompt_set_tz_location: You can share your location to set the timezone automatically, or type the name manually (ex: Africa/Douala):
prompt_set_prefix: Please send the new button prefix (ex: 🔰):
prompt_set_schedule:
Current schedule: {current_sched}

Send the new auto-send times (separated by space, ex: 08:00 20:00):
prompt_add_admin: Please send user ID or forward a message to name as administrator:
error_owner_only: Only the bot owner can perform this action.
error_invalid_user_id: Invalid input. Make sure to send a numeric ID or forward a user message with visible ID.
prompt_revoke_admin: Please send the ID of the administrator to revoke, or forward one of their messages:
error_cannot_revoke_owner: You cannot revoke the bot owner.
prompt_ban_user: Send user ID to ban or forward one of their messages:
error_cannot_ban_admin: Cannot ban an administrator or the owner.
error_user_not_found: This user does not exist in the database!
prompt_broadcast_msg: Please send the message you want to broadcast:
prompt_add_channel: Send ID (ex: -100...), @username or **forward a message** from your channel:
error_bot_not_admin: Bot is not an administrator of this channel, or lacks permissions (Post & Invite).
error_user_not_admin: You must be Owner or Administrator with right to invite members on this channel.
error_channel_not_found: Cannot access this channel. ID or Username not found or make it public temporarily.
error_not_a_channel: This corresponds to a group or profile. Only channels are allowed.
prompt_category: Channel {title} identified! Detected language: {detected_lang} Please choose the main category for your channel:
help_msg: Help Guide 📚 Welcome to help menu. Bot is under development.
user_no_channels: You haven't added any channels yet. Go to '➕ Add a Channel' to start.
user_my_channels_msg: 📢 Your Channels ({total}) Select one of your channels from the list below to see its statistics or remove it:
prompt_confirm_remove: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to remove this channel? The channel will be permanently deleted from the platform and unsubscribed from all cross-promotions (Megas).
prompt_ad_name: 📝 Please give an internal name to this ad (ex: 'Promo April'):
prompt_folder_link: Please send complete link of your Telegram Folder (ex: https://t.me/addlist/xyz):
prompt_ad_content:
Please send publication content (Text, Photo, or Video).

💡 For text publications, you can use  to insert categorized list of channels:
msg_ad_created: Publication created successfully! Use 'Preview' to see result.
msg_select_ad_to_preview: 📁 List of Created Ads Select an ad to preview:
ad_list_legend: Legend: ⏸️: Suspend | ▶️: Activate 📝: Modify content 🗑️: Delete ad 👁️: Preview
prompt_edit_ad_content: 📝 Please send the new content for this ad:
prompt_paid_promo_start: 🛒 Add a Sponsor You can: 1️⃣ Forward a message from a channel. 2️⃣ Send Link or @username of a channel. 3️⃣ Type Name of sponsor for manual entry.
prompt_paid_promo_url_manual: Please now send the destination link (URL):
prompt_paid_promo_target_cat: 🎯 Targeting: Categories Select categories where this sponsor should appear (or 'All'):
error_paid_promo_fetch: Impossible to fetch channel info. Check if bot is present or enter manually.
error_no_channels: Error: No channels registered for sending.
msg_list_too_long_file: The list is too long to display. Here is the full file:
msg_support_requested: 🆘 New Support Request User: {name} ({user_id}) Ticket ID: {ticket_id} Click the button below to reply.
msg_support_taken: 🤝 Support Taken Charge Administrator {admin_name} is handling your request. You can now send your messages directly here.
msg_support_started: ✅ You have taken charge of {name}'s ticket. Reply to the forwarded messages to speak to them.
msg_ticket_closed: 🔒 Your support ticket has been closed. Thank you!
msg_support_already_active: ⚠️ You already have an active support ticket. Please wait for the response.
msg_support_intro: 💬 Technical Support Please description your problem below. An administrator will reply soon.
msg_select_ad_to_delete: 🗑️ Remove Messages (Channels) Select the promotion whose messages you want to remove from all channels:
msg_select_paid_ad_to_delete: 🗑️ Delete a Sponsor Select the sponsor (paid link) to delete:
prompt_ban_channel: 🚫 Ban a Channel Send ID, @username or forward a message from the channel to ban:
prompt_unban_channel: ✅ Unban a Channel Send ID, @username or forward a message from the channel to unban:
msg_your_channel_banned: 🚫 Your channel {title} has been banned from the platform by an administrator.
msg_your_channel_unbanned: ✅ Your channel {title} has been unbanned from the platform by an administrator. Failures reset.
msg_channel_failure_warning: ⚠️ Warning: Your channel {title} encountered sending errors. Please check bot permissions.
prompt_edit_ad_folder_link: Please send the new Telegram folder link:
msg_promote_confirm: Do you want to promote the channel {title} as a paid promotion?
msg_admin_channel_info: ℹ️ Channel Info 📢 Title: {title} 🆔 ID: {id} 👤 Username: {username} 👥 Members: {members} 📅 Added by: {added_by} 📂 Category: {category} 🌐 Language: {language} 🚫 Status: {status} ⚠️ Error(s): {failures}/3
prompt_show_channel: Please forward a message from the channel or send its ID / link:
msg_admin_stats_header: 📊 Global Statistics 👥 Users: {users_total} ({users_active} active, {users_banned} banned) 📢 Channels: {channels_total} ({channels_active} active, {channels_banned} banned) 📝 Ads: {ads_total} ({ads_active} active, {ads_completed} completed) 📈 Broadcast: {posts_total} messages sent
msg_user_stats_growth_note: 💡 Statistics are based on daily snapshots recorded by the bot.
error_min_members: ❌ Your channel must have at least {min} members.
error_max_members: ❌ Your channel must not exceed {max} members.
log_new_channel: ⚜ #NewChannel ⚜ 👤 Added by: {user} 👑 Name: {title} 🪪 ID: {channel_id} 📂 Category: {category} 🌎 Language: {language}
prompt_paid_promo_name: 📝 Please give an internal name for this sponsor (ex: Sponsor1):
msg_select_paid_promo_to_manage:
💳 Sponsor Management

Select a sponsor to manage:
error_timeout: Request timed out. Please start again.
prompt_confirm_delete_ad: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to delete this ad? This action is irreversible.
msg_clone_success:
✅ Congratulations! Your bot is now operational.

Click this link to configure it: @{username}
error_cloning_failed: ❌ Cloning failed. Check if the token is valid and the bot is not already in use.
error_nesting_clones: You cannot clone a bot from a clone.
prompt_send_token: 🤖 Create your own Bot To start, please send or forward a message containing your bot token (obtained via @BotFather). Once received, we will automatically set up your clone!
msg_my_clones_list: 📋 Your cloned bots Here is the list of your clones. Click one to manage it.
msg_admin_clones_list: 🌐 [Admin] All Clones List of all cloned bots in the system:
msg_clone_redirect:
🤖 To create your own bot, please use our main bot.

Click the link below to get started: @{username}
